channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com

item.title: Japanese splatter horror game CRUELTY now available for PS5, PS4, and Switch
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch

Previously released for PC.

Publisher CREEK & RIVER and Sapporo-based developer 883 Maniacs have released splatter horror game CRUELTY for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch for $7.99 / £5.79 / €6.99 / ¥1,210, the companies announced. It supports English and Japanese options.

CRUELTY first launched for PC via Steam on June 17, 2024.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

CRUELTY is a Japanese-made splatter horror. It is a third-person perspective 3D survival horror game.

Instead of engaging in combat with enemies, players must progress through stages by solving puzzles while evading or hiding from threats. Survival hinges on escaping or concealing oneself.

The playtime typically ranges from 30 to 60 minutes.

Story

You were in an accident and lost consciousness.

The moment you wake up, you find yourself in a nightmare world, one that is not of this Earth.

In an abattoir ruled by madness, horrific scenes unfold, and inescapable terror awaits you.

To survive, you must solve numerous mysteries in this world of fear while evading the gaze of monstrous beings as you progress.

Key Features

  • Immersive high-quality graphics utilizing the latest game engine technology.
  • Cinematic movie scenes.
  • Elaborate depictions of gore and frightening effects.
  • Fully-voiced for an immersive experience.
  • Difficulty level selection function.

Watch a new trailer below.

PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/japanese-splatter-horror-game-cruelty-now-available-for-ps5-ps4-and-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves ‘Wolves’ Destiny’ update detailed
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Due out alongside Wolfgang Krauser on April 24.

SNK has released a new series of trailers introducing the major update for Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves due out alongside downloadable content character Wolfgang Krauser‘s release on April 24.

The update will include the following content:

  • Wolfgang Krauser joins the roster.
  • Addition of “Wolves’ Destiny,” the first-ever main story mode of its kind in Fatal Fury series history.
    • In Wolves’ Destiny, the fierce battle between the returned Emperor Krauser and the Emperor of Second South, Kain, begins… Witness this struggle for power in all its glory! A story of over 15,000 words fully voiced in both Japanese and English brought to life with nearly 150 new, original illustrations.
  • New costume for Kain commemorating the new “Wolves’ Destiny” mode.
  • Ring Out Battles make their return.
  • Introducing the Fighter’s Hub, a one-stop shop for online match settings.
  • Smart Style now allows the use of heavy special moves.

Additionally, SNK announced that Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves is now available in an entry tier “Standard Edition” format, featuring all games modes and characters (excluding downloadable content characters) for $19.99 / €19.99. The “Legends Edition,” which includes Season Pass 1 and Season Pass 2, is available for $49.99 / €49.99.

Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch the new trailers below.

1st Anniversary Video

English

Japanese

Major Update Trailer

English

Japanese

Wolves’ Destiny Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/fatal-fury-city-of-the-wolves-wolves-destiny-update-detailed
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: D3 Publisher announces CARD&CASINO for Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Due out on April 23.

D3 Publisher has announced CARD&CASINO for Switch 2. It will launch on April 23. In Japan, it is known as SIMPLE Series for Nintendo Switch 2 Vol.3 THE Card & Casino.

Here is an overview of the game, via its official website:

About

Master the table: five games, infinite strategy.

CARD&CASINO brings the authentic atmosphere of the Vegas Strip to your fingertips. Players can test their luck and sharpen their skills across five meticulously crafted experiences: Texas Hold’em, Blackjack, Draw Poker, Baccarat, and Roulette.

Fully optimized for Nintendo‘s newest hardware, CARD&CASINO leverages enhanced processing power to deliver stunning visual fidelity and seamless performance.

Dominate the Global Leaderboards

Rise to the top as the world’s leading earner in competitive Online Matches. Stay in the zone with “Never-Wait” Matchmaking, featuring interactive mini-games that keep the action flowing between every round.

Master the Craft: Offline and Local Play

Hone your skills through diverse solo and local modes:

  • Free Play and Arcade – Experience fully customizable rules or take on high-stakes, stage-based challenges.
  • Mini Casino – A focused practice environment to grind coins and dominate local leaderboards.
  • GameShare Enabled – Share your world with friends and play as one.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/d3-publisher-announces-cardcasino-for-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nexon announces isometric dark fantasy MMORPG Embers of the Uncrowned for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Rebuild a noble house devastated by elves and reclaim the land.

Nexon has announced Embers of the Uncrowned, an isometric dark fantasy massively multiplayer online RPG coming to PC via Steam. A release date was not announced. It will support English, Simplified Chinese, Russian, German, Spanish, and Portuguese language options.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Embers of the Uncrowned is a dark fantasy MMORPG where fast-paced, satisfying isometric view combat meets brutal, gory visuals. In an epic tale drenched in human blood at the hands of elven invaders, embark on a journey to reignite the house’s last ember of hope.

Embark on an Adventure to Rebuild Your Mighty House

Your quest unfolds in Embers of the Uncrowned, a dark fantasy MMORPG presented in a rich isometric view. In a continent ravaged by an elven invasion, you are the last hope for House Harborwell. Born illegitimate, you left home to become a mercenary, only to find that destiny has called you back. Now, as the rightful lord, you must reclaim your lost domain and rebuild your house. Fight back against the corrupted creatures and elven forces that plague the continent.

Experience Thrilling and Tactical Combat

Victory is not won by strength alone. Your skill and strategic judgement will determine the outcome of every battle. Master unique classes and dominate the battlefield with the help of your trusted companions.

  • Unique Classes – Choose your path. The Spectral Blade carves through her foes using her longsword and swift swordsmanship. The Executioner annihilates his enemies with a single crushing blow from his giant axe. The Stormbringer calls down the storm’s fury, striking her enemies with powerful wind and lightning magic. Each class offers unique skills and attributes, allowing you to create diverse combat styles and experiment with different skill trees.
  • Loyal Companions – You are not alone in your fight. Your companions will always stand by your side. Recruit them, grow stronger together, and create powerful synergies to bolster your forces.
  • ❮
  • ❯

Join Forces to Conquer Formidable Threats

Some enemies are too powerful to be faced alone. Band together with other players to defeat the colossal threats plaguing the land and obtain valuable rewards.

  • Domain Bosses – Join forces with other players to reclaim your land from the mighty bosses that occupy them. Securing your domain is the first step to restoring your House’s honor.
  • Raids – Confront overwhelmingly powerful bosses. Victory can only be achieved through perfect cooperation and flawless tactics.

Explore a World of Endless Possibilities

In Embers of the Uncrowned, your strength is your House’s strength. Liberate more regions so word of your house spreads, and watch as your settlement prospers and your glory grows.

  • A Bustling Settlement – What starts as a humble camp will grow into a vibrant city through your efforts. Watch as people gather and your domain expands.
  • Infinite Progression – Push your potential to its limits. Combine Skill Gems, enhance gear, and awaken the ancient power of your bloodline.
  • Hidden Stories – The continent is filled with tragic stories and mysterious adventures. Explore the world and uncover its cruel secrets.

Create Your Own Style with Rich Character Customization

Let your individuality shine, even in the heat of battle. Embers of the Uncrowned offers detailed face and body customization (with gender selection coming soon). Choose from a wide array of distinctive costumes and let your choice be a flash of brilliance in a dark fantasy world as you make your mark on the battlefield. Mix and match to create a signature look all your own.

Seizure / Photosensitivity Warning

Embers of the Uncrowned may contain flashing lights and images that may induce epileptic seizures, even for those with no history of seizures or epilepsy. If you or anyone in your household has an epileptic condition, or if you begin to experience symptoms of a seizure (e.g., dizziness, altered vision, eye or muscle twitches, motion sickness, etc.), immediately stop playing and consult a doctor before proceeding. You can reduce the likelihood of a seizure by avoiding large screens, taking breaks, playing in a well-lit room, and not playing when you feel drowsy or fatigued.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here.

Cinematic Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/nexon-announces-isometric-dark-fantasy-mmorpg-embers-of-the-uncrowned-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
